comment.body:
Yup, usually when there's supposed to be a big squeeze, players buy options around the close. Then on the next day market goes... bull trap - bear trap - squeeze. 

I remember nvda option flow before one of the biggest squeezes last year, when it went from 100 to 150. I think it was 9-10.09.24. So I'm waiting just like Alma, for THE bottom. 

But on the other hand, Alma knows Arabians bought into US. She gets the whole picture. And she's the best trader I have ever encountered. She even made ME profitable.

comment.body: Market can't move up until those ITM puts close out. Thats what is suppressing us which (imo) is what alma referred to as the reverse of what she expected because if those Puts had closed out we would have had a monster squeeze. Thats why even though VIX is down 10% we only had like a .5% day (feel free to correct me if my understanding is wrong)
